distros.name: y4n/architect-ai
distros.description: AI-powered software architect environment with Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Pi for code exploration and technical decision-making
distros.readme:
# y4n/architect-ai

A development environment for software architects who rely on AI agents for code exploration, codebase understanding, and technical decision-making.

Includes Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, OpenCode, and Pi alongside fish shell, cli-essentials, and tui-power.
